final:
// // This counter decrements instead of increments
module sync_counter(
    input clk,
    input rst,

    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk)
begin
    if (rst)
        count <= 4'b0000;   // reset
    else
        count <= count + 1; // increment
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This counter decrements instead of increments
